trip.name: Tokyo Team Adventure: Food, Trains & Culture

days.title: Arrival in Tokyo
days.subtitle: Narita Express to Shinjuku, settle into the neon metropolis

timeline.title: Team meets at Narita Airport
timeline.detail: Group assembles at Narita International Airport Terminal 1 or 2. Confirm all 6 team members have arrived and collect luggage.

timeline.title: Narita Express (N'EX) Train to Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Board the N'EX train for a scenic 60-minute ride directly to Shinjuku Station. Perfect introduction to Japan's legendary train system with commentary and views of the Kanto Plain.
timeline.mapQuery: Narita Express, Narita Airport to Shinjuku Station, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Arrive Shinjuku Station
timeline.detail: Arrive at Shinjuku Station, one of the world's busiest train stations. Navigate the maze of exits and head to the hotel with luggage.

timeline.title: Check-in at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Early check-in (if available) or luggage storage at Hotel Gracery. Settle in, freshen up, and regroup as a team. Room key distribution and orientation.

timeline.title: Lunch at Shinjuku Food Scene
timeline.detail: Explore local ramen, tonkatsu, or sushi near Shinjuku Station. Team lunch to refuel and discuss the trip itinerary over authentic Japanese cuisine.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku, Tokyo, Japan - Ramen or Tonkatsu restaurant

timeline.title: Shinjuku Exploration & Photography Tour
timeline.detail: Walk through Shinjuku's vibrant streets, Meiji-dori shopping avenue, and capture the urban landscape. Stop at iconic photo spots and browse shops for team bonding.

timeline.title: Neon Lights & Street Photography
timeline.detail: Experience the famous Shinjuku neon signs, backlit buildings, and bustling streets as the sun sets. Capture the electric atmosphere and iconic red/blue neon glow.

timeline.title: Team Dinner at Omoide Yokocho
timeline.detail: Visit the nostalgic Omoide Yokocho (Memory Lane) alley for authentic yakitori, izakaya dining, and local atmosphere. Celebrate the team's arrival with drinks and grilled skewers.

timeline.title: Evening Stroll & Nightlife
timeline.detail: Walk back through illuminated Shinjuku streets, explore late-night shops, or visit a karaoke bar for team bonding and fun. Optional visit to a local izakaya or convenience store.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel Gracery & Rest
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku for the night. Debrief as a team, prepare for Day 2, and settle in for well-deserved rest after travel.

localTips: Get Suica IC card at airport

days.title: East Tokyo: Tradition & Temples
days.subtitle: Asakusa, Senso-ji, Meiji Shrine, Harajuku shopping

timeline.title: Hotel checkout & breakfast
timeline.detail: Early checkout from Hotel Gracery Shinjuku. Grab quick breakfast or coffee at hotel or nearby convenience store before heading to Asakusa.

timeline.title: Train to Asakusa
timeline.detail: Take JR Yamanote Line or Tokyo Metro from Shinjuku to Asakusa Station (30-40 minutes). Aim to arrive before sunrise for the temple.

timeline.title: Senso-ji Temple at dawn
timeline.detail: Experience the iconic red lantern and sacred temple in the quiet early morning light. Walk through the peaceful grounds and participate in morning rituals. Perfect photography opportunity with minimal crowds.

timeline.title: Nakamise shopping street breakfast
timeline.detail: Stroll the historic shopping street as vendors open. Sample local street food like taiyaki, mochi, and senbei. Great for team photos and souvenirs.

timeline.title: Train to Meiji Shrine
timeline.detail: Take Tokyo Metro Ginza Line to Gaiemmae or Omotesando Station. Transfer if needed (40 minutes total). Head toward the peaceful forest shrine.

timeline.title: Meiji Shrine forest walk
timeline.detail: Walk through the serene forested grounds of this important Shinto shrine. Explore the peaceful paths, see wooden ema prayer plaques, and experience authentic Japanese spiritual culture away from crowds.

timeline.title: Lunch in Omotesando or Harajuku
timeline.detail: Team lunch at a trendy restaurant or casual ramen shop near Harajuku. Options range from upscale cafes to street food. Budget 1-1.5 hours.

timeline.title: Takeshita Street shopping
timeline.detail: Explore the vibrant, colorful Takeshita Street famous for fashion, street style, and unique boutiques. Perfect for team shopping, photos, and experiencing Harajuku youth culture.

timeline.title: Harajuku cafe break & crepes
timeline.detail: Rest and refuel with famous Harajuku crepes or bubble tea at one of the trendy cafes. Take team photos in this Instagram-worthy district.

timeline.title: Train back to Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Take JR Yamanote Line from Harajuku to Shinjuku Station (15 minutes). Return to hotel area for rest before evening activities.

timeline.title: Hotel rest & freshen up
timeline.detail: Return to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku. Rest, shower, and prepare for dinner and evening activities. Team can regroup and discuss the day.

timeline.title: Team dinner in Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Dinner at a izakaya, conveyor belt sushi, or upscale restaurant within walking distance of hotel. Great for team bonding and trying local cuisine.

timeline.title: Nightlife - Shinjuku exploration
timeline.detail: Experience Shinjuku's neon-lit streets, karaoke bars, izakayas, or clubs. Great for team nightlife and creating memorable experiences together.

timeline.title: Return to hotel & rest
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku for the night. Prepare for Day 3 adventures.

days.title: West Tokyo: Gardens & Nightlife
days.subtitle: Shinjuku Gyoen, teamlab digital art, Shibuya Crossing, Golden Gai

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel
timeline.detail: Team breakfast at Hotel Gracery Shinjuku before heading out for the day. Fuel up for a busy schedule.

timeline.title: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
timeline.detail: Explore the beautiful springtime gardens with cherry blossoms and seasonal flowers. Perfect for team photos and peaceful walk before activities.
timeline.mapQuery: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: teamLab Borderless Digital Art Museum
timeline.detail: Immerse the team in interactive digital art installations and light displays. Book tickets in advance for 6 people; allow 2-3 hours for full experience.

timeline.title: Lunch in Shinjuku
timeline.detail: Team lunch at a popular Shinjuku ramen or tonkatsu restaurant. Great for refueling and regrouping before afternoon activities.

timeline.title: Shopping & Street Photography
timeline.detail: Free time for shopping at Shinjuku shopping streets (Takeshita-dori style energy). Capture urban photography moments and browse boutiques.

timeline.title: Shibuya Crossing Experience
timeline.detail: Head to the world-famous Shibuya Crossing for the busiest pedestrian scramble. Arrive before sunset for iconic photos; take the train from Shinjuku.

timeline.title: Dinner at Shibuya Restaurant
timeline.detail: Early dinner at a Shibuya restaurant with views or local specialty. Options include sushi, yakitori, or wagyu for the team.

timeline.title: Golden Gai Izakaya Crawl
timeline.detail: Team izakaya crawl through Golden Gai's tiny bars and standing bars. Experience authentic Tokyo nightlife with local drinks, appetizers, and team bonding.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Head back to Hotel Gracery Shinjuku via train. Short ride from Golden Gai in walking distance.

timeline.title: Team Debrief & Rest
timeline.detail: Optional team hangout in hotel lobby or return to rooms. Reflect on the day and prepare for Day 4.

localTips: Golden Gai groups of 2-3 max per bar

days.title: Culinary Deep Dive & Markets
days.subtitle: Tsukiji Outer Market, sushi class, Michelin-starred dinner

days.title: Modern Tokyo: Tech & Pop Culture
days.subtitle: Akihabara electronics, Ikebukuro anime culture, karaoke night

timeline.title: Hotel Breakfast & Checkout
timeline.detail: Enjoy breakfast at Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya before heading out for the day's tech and pop culture adventure.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Train to Akihabara
timeline.detail: Take the JR Yamanote Line or Marunouchi Line from Shinjuku to Akihabara Station (approximately 15-20 minutes).

timeline.title: Akihabara Mega-Stores Tour
timeline.detail: Explore iconic electronics mega-stores like Yodobashi Camera and Don Quijote to see the latest gadgets and technology. Perfect for photography enthusiasts.

timeline.title: Pokemon Center Flagship
timeline.detail: Visit the official Pokemon Center flagship store in Akihabara to hunt for exclusive merchandise, collectibles, and team souvenirs.

timeline.title: Lunch in Akihabara
timeline.detail: Enjoy a quick team lunch at a local ramen or tonkatsu restaurant in Akihabara's dining district.

timeline.title: Train to Ikebukuro
timeline.detail: Take the JR Sobu Line to Ikebukuro Station for anime and manga culture exploration (approximately 12 minutes).

timeline.title: Ghibli Merchandise Hunting
timeline.detail: Explore Studio Ghibli shops and anime specialty stores in Ikebukuro's Otome Road district to find rare Ghibli merchandise and collectibles.

timeline.title: Dinner in Ikebukuro
timeline.detail: Team dinner at a popular restaurant featuring contemporary Japanese cuisine or casual dining experience before karaoke.

timeline.title: Team Karaoke Marathon
timeline.detail: Book a private karaoke room in Ikebukuro or Shinjuku for an extended karaoke session with the team. Many venues offer all-you-can-drink packages.

timeline.title: Late Night Snacks & Train Home
timeline.detail: Grab late-night ramen or convenience store snacks before heading back to Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya via train.
timeline.mapQuery: Ramen Yokocho Alley, Shinjuku, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: Arrive back at Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya and wind down after an exciting day of tech, pop culture, and team bonding.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

localTips: Tax-free shopping available at major stores

days.title: Tokyo Neighborhoods & Hidden Gems
days.subtitle: Shimokitazawa vintage, Kichijoji park, cat cafes, final shopping

timeline.title: Hotel Breakfast & Check-out
timeline.detail: Enjoy breakfast at Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, then check out with luggage storage arranged for later pickup.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Train to Shimokitazawa
timeline.detail: Take Shibuya-bound train to Shimokitazawa Station (Keio Inokashira Line, ~15 minutes). Walk to vintage district.

timeline.title: Shimokitazawa Vintage Shopping
timeline.detail: Explore vintage clothing shops, retro record stores, and quirky boutiques in this bohemian neighborhood. Perfect for unique souvenirs and team photos.

timeline.title: Lunch at Shimokitazawa
timeline.detail: Try local ramen, yakitori, or casual dining at one of the neighborhood's popular eateries. Great for team bonding.

timeline.title: Train to Kichijoji
timeline.detail: Take Keio Inokashira Line directly to Kichijoji Station (~10 minutes). Exit and head toward Inokashira Park.

timeline.title: Inokashira Park Boating
timeline.detail: Rent a rowboat or swan boat on the beautiful lake for a relaxing team activity with scenic views. Group photos highly recommended.

timeline.title: Cat Cafe Experience
timeline.detail: Visit a popular cat cafe near Kichijoji for interaction with adorable cats while enjoying drinks. Unique and Instagram-worthy group activity.

timeline.title: Train to Shinjuku for Final Shopping
timeline.detail: Return to Shinjuku Station area via Keio Inokashira Line. Explore Shinjuku shopping districts for last-minute souvenirs.

timeline.title: Shinjuku Shopping & Souvenirs
timeline.detail: Browse duty-free shops, department stores, and souvenir shops in Shinjuku. Visit Takeshitaya, Lumine, or 109 for team shopping.

timeline.title: Team Dinner & Celebration
timeline.detail: Enjoy final dinner at a Shinjuku restaurant or izakaya to celebrate the trip. Options include kaiseki, sushi, or contemporary fusion.

timeline.title: Return to Hotel & Pack
timeline.detail: Return to Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, pick up luggage, pack belongings, and prepare for departure the next day.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

days.title: Departure
days.subtitle: Final breakfast, train to Narita, fly home

timeline.title: Hotel checkout
timeline.detail: Settle bill and collect luggage at Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya. Confirm all team members have packed and are ready for departure.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Final team breakfast
timeline.detail: Enjoy a special farewell breakfast at a highly-rated local restaurant near Shibuya. Share memorable moments from the trip over quality Japanese and international cuisine.

timeline.title: Return to hotel for luggage
timeline.detail: Head back to Mitsuki Garden Hotel to collect stored luggage and finalize any remaining check-out procedures. Ensure all rooms are cleared.
timeline.mapQuery: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Travel to Narita Express station
timeline.detail: Depart hotel and travel to the nearest Narita Express (N'EX) station in Shinjuku via taxi or train to catch your flight departure train.

timeline.title: Narita Express departure
timeline.detail: Board the N'EX train at Shinjuku Station heading directly to Narita Airport Terminal 1 or 3. Enjoy the scenic 60-minute journey and reflect on the adventure.
timeline.mapQuery: Narita Express, Shinjuku Station, Tokyo, Japan

timeline.title: Narita Airport arrival and check-in
timeline.detail: Arrive at Narita Airport Terminal. Check in luggage, proceed through security, and confirm your flight details with the team.

timeline.title: Terminal shopping and browsing
timeline.detail: Explore duty-free shops and Terminal 1/3 boutiques to purchase last-minute souvenirs, Japanese snacks, and gifts. Browse unique Tokyo and Japanese specialty items.
timeline.mapQuery: Narita Airport Terminal 1 and Terminal 3, Chiba, Japan

timeline.title: Team lunch at airport restaurant
timeline.detail: Gather for a final meal at an airport terminal restaurant before boarding. Share photos and highlights from the Tokyo Team Adventure.
timeline.mapQuery: Restaurants Narita Airport Terminal, Chiba, Japan

timeline.title: Boarding and departure
timeline.detail: Head to your gate, board the flight, and depart for home. Reflect on the incredible food, train experiences, and cultural moments shared with your team.

hotels.name: Hotel Gracery Shinjuku
hotels.note: 3-min walk from JR Shinjuku East Exit

hotels.name: Mitsui Garden Hotel Shibuya
hotels.note: 5-min walk from JR Shibuya South Exit

budget.note: RM 2,400 per person, AirAsia X PEN-NRT

budget.item: Narita Express Train Tickets (12 x round-trip)

budget.note: Contingency for team gifts & personal purchases

urgent.label: Book teamLab Borderless Tokyo
urgent.note: Sells out 1-2 weeks ahead, Day 3 activity
